newsSinceJun6: No material new disclosures since June 6, 2026. Latest items all predate the window: 2025 annual report and board filings (May 14), two abnormal-trading-volatility notices (May 8 and May 13), interactive-platform confirmation that 1.6T optical modules are ready for volume delivery, and the March OFC 2026 debut of a 3.2T silicon-photonics NPO module plus the AOI $200M 1.6T order that drove a March 10 limit-up. Today's +1.56% move is flow drift, not news.

sources.label: Cailian Press - Accelink: 1.6T modules ready for volume delivery
Caiwen News - March 10 limit-up on AOI 1.6T order (context, pre-window)

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's verdict already moved it down for the ~197% YTD rerating; today brings no new fundamental evidence and only a +1.56% drift, so re-penalizing the same crowding twice in two sessions is unwarranted. Mild negative drift as the grind higher without fresh orders keeps eroding residual alpha.
verdicts.bull: Full-stack optics player (chips through modules) under China Information & Communication Technologies Group with 800G shipping to ByteDance/Alibaba-class CSPs, 1.6T ready for volume delivery, and a world-first 3.2T silicon-photonics NPO module validated at a leading domestic CSP - a domestic-substitution bottleneck if US-supplier access tightens.
verdicts.neutral: AI optics exposure is real but now fully recognized: two exchange abnormal-volatility notices in May, ~$25B market cap, and consensus 1.6T volume estimates already revised from ~10M to 25M+ units, so execution merely meeting expectations sustains rank 68 rather than improving it.
verdicts.bear: Stock trades roughly 80% above the average analyst target after a ~3x YTD run; any 1.6T ramp slippage, ASP erosion, or a pending private placement's dilution could trigger a sharp de-rating in a crowded retail-heavy name.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Confirmed volume 1.6T shipments or a named hyperscaler order (H2 2026 ramp), plus 3.2T NPO/CPO design wins converting to revenue.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowding/valuation reset - post-rerating multiple compression if 1.6T volumes or margins disappoint, compounded by placement dilution.
